page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.24xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The processing power is delivered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor, configured with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio to ensure dedicated execution resources per vCPU.

The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU cores and high memory density. Suitable workloads include large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks that require substantial memory capacity without local storage dependencies.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.24xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs on an x86_64 architecture. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz, it provides 768.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This configuration is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, in-memory databases, and large-scale data processing workloads.
